topic_zh: AI 应当拥有法律人格
topic_en: AI systems should have legal personhood
pro_label: AI should have limited legal personhood
con_label: AI should not have legal personhood

topic_zh: 政府应强制标注所有 AI 生成内容
topic_en: Governments should require labels on all AI-generated content

topic_zh: 人脸识别应被禁止用于公共场所实时监控
topic_en: Real-time facial recognition in public spaces should be banned

topic_zh: 自动驾驶汽车应优先保护乘客而非行人
topic_en: Autonomous vehicles should prioritize passengers over pedestrians

topic_zh: 学校应允许学生使用生成式 AI 完成作业
topic_en: Schools should allow students to use generative AI for assignments

topic_zh: 社交媒体平台应对虚假信息承担法律责任
topic_en: Social media platforms should be legally liable for misinformation

topic_zh: 大学应取消期末考试
topic_en: Universities should abolish final exams

topic_zh: 大学教育应以就业能力为首要目标
topic_en: University education should prioritize employability

topic_zh: 中小学应全面禁止手机进校园
topic_en: K-12 schools should ban student smartphones on campus

topic_zh: 大学录取应取消标准化考试成绩
topic_en: University admissions should remove standardized test scores

topic_zh: 在线教育可以替代传统课堂
topic_en: Online education can replace traditional classrooms

topic_zh: 学校应将心理健康课设为必修课
topic_en: Mental health education should be mandatory in schools

topic_zh: 社会应推行全面无现金支付
topic_en: Society should move toward fully cashless payments

topic_zh: 政府应实行全民基本收入
topic_en: Governments should implement universal basic income

topic_zh: 城市应征收拥堵费
topic_en: Cities should introduce congestion pricing

topic_zh: 公共交通应免费
topic_en: Public transport should be free

topic_zh: 政府应对含糖饮料征收重税
topic_en: Governments should heavily tax sugary drinks
con_label: Do not heavily tax sugary drinks

topic_zh: 投票年龄应降至 16 岁
topic_en: The voting age should be lowered to 16

topic_zh: 核能是解决气候危机的最优选择
topic_en: Nuclear power is the best solution to the climate crisis
con_label: Nuclear is not the best solution

topic_zh: 发达国家应为气候损失与损害支付赔偿
topic_en: Developed countries should pay compensation for climate loss and damage

topic_zh: 个人碳账户应成为强制制度
topic_en: Personal carbon accounts should be mandatory
con_label: Do not make carbon accounts mandatory

topic_zh: 城市应限制私家车使用
topic_en: Cities should restrict private car use

topic_zh: 快时尚品牌应承担更高环境税
topic_en: Fast fashion brands should pay higher environmental taxes
con_label: Do not single out fast fashion

topic_zh: 经济增长应让位于环境保护
topic_en: Economic growth should yield to environmental protection

topic_zh: 最低工资应大幅提高
topic_en: The minimum wage should be substantially increased
con_label: Do not substantially increase minimum wage

topic_zh: 大公司应实行四天工作制
topic_en: Large companies should adopt a four-day workweek

topic_zh: 加密货币应被严格监管
topic_en: Cryptocurrencies should be strictly regulated

topic_zh: 平台经济劳动者应被认定为雇员
topic_en: Gig economy workers should be classified as employees

topic_zh: 奢侈品消费税应提高
topic_en: Luxury consumption taxes should be increased

topic_zh: 企业应公开员工薪资区间
topic_en: Companies should publicly disclose salary ranges
